rejected_rule.name: goal_validity_arbitration_v1
rejected_rule.rejection_reason: safe but inert on the frozen independent source; it cannot support a paper-facing utility claim

counterfactual_result.name: unique_strong_own_view_identity
counterfactual_result.interpretation: loose identity evidence is nontrivial but unsafe on the same frozen evidence

design_principle.fact: The same detector-backed evidence yields a strict-safe/inert rule and a loose-nontrivial/unsafe rule.
design_principle.agent_inference: The next revision must change the evidence design or candidate-validity model. It must not tune semantic rank, detector score, depth, own-count, or identity-margin thresholds from joined labels.

required_revision_branches.required_action: route to expanded retrieval or backend recall repair
required_revision_branches.blocked_action: commit based on semantic rank or detector box alone

required_revision_branches.required_action: request discriminative rival/paired view or compute multi-view association consistency
required_revision_branches.blocked_action: treat absence of cross support as identity proof

required_revision_branches.required_action: add candidate-validity evidence that distinguishes visible category instance from valid ObjectNav goal
required_revision_branches.blocked_action: commit from unique own-view support alone

required_revision_branches.required_action: report backend recall failure and route to expanded retrieval
required_revision_branches.blocked_action: force a choice among invalid planned candidates

required_revision_branches.required_action: keep no-commit branch unless independent existence confirmation evidence is defined
